title: EB has update, CC on the latest -  Update button, Release notes and Poly Lens links are available
scenario: When app starts with Tern/Emu where Earbuds have an update available and Charge Case is on latest version, clicking Update button navigates to Device Settings with Software Update tab expanded, showing Earbuds-only update button with "1" tag, Charge Case info about needing Lens Desktop, and links to Release Notes and Poly Lens App.
steps: Launch the app with Tern/Emu where Earbuds have an update available and the Charge Case is on the latest version.
Click the Update button on the device home screen.
Check for the Update button for Earbuds only.
Check for the '1' tag on the settings tab.
Check the information displayed under Charge Case.
Check for links to Release Notes (for Earbuds) and Poly Lens App (for Charge Case).
expected: An Update button is displayed on the device home screen. Clicking the Update button navigates to Device Settings with the Software Update tab expanded. An Update button for Earbuds only is available, with a "1" tag on the settings tab. Information about needing Lens Desktop is displayed under Charge Case. Links to Release Notes (for Earbuds) and Poly Lens App (for Charge Case) are present.
